zh.Stanwell, Middlesex, England: 英國米德萊可斯坦維爾
zh.Blickling, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可布利可林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice de Windsor於1413年出生在英國諾福爾可布利可林時，她的父親Richard de Windsor18歲，母親Lady Christian Faulkner19歲。她於1436年與Richard Fortescue在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1483年2月10日在英國戴文享年70歲。

zh-hans.Stanwell, Middlesex, England: 英国米德萊可斯坦維爾
zh-hans.Blickling, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可布利可林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice de Windsor于1413年出生在英国諾福爾可布利可林时，她的父亲Richard de Windsor18岁，母亲Lady Christian Faulkner19岁。她于1436年与Richard Fortescue在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1483年2月10日在英国戴文享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Windsor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Windsor (Berkshire), Windsor in Stratford upon Avon (Warwickshire), Winsor in Copythorne (Hampshire), Winsor in Yealmpton (Devon), or Broadwindsor and Little Windsor (Dorset). All these places have the same linguistic origin, whose meaning is controversial, but seems to be ‘windlass bank’ (Old English windels + ōra).

in Yorkshire perhaps a habitational name from Winds Over in Middleton (near Ilkley, Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English wind ‘wind’ (genitive windes) + ofer ‘slope, hill, ridge’.

variants.name: Winzer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Ilse, Ingo, Wilhelm.
German: occupational name for a vine-grower or vintner, Middle High German winzer.
German: habitational name from any of various places so named in Bavaria.

variants.name: Winsor
meanings: English: variant of   Windsor  . This is the spelling used for places so named in Devon and Hampshire.
Perhaps also an Americanized form of German   Winzer  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice de Windsor was born in 1413, in Blickling, Norfolk, England, her father, Richard de Windsor, was 18 and her mother, Lady Christian Faulkner, was 19. She married Richard Fortescue in 1436, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 10 February 1483, in Devon, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice de Windsor est née en 1413, à Blickling, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Windsor, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Lady Christian Faulkner, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Fortescue en 1436, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 10 février 1483, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice de Windsor 1413 in Blickling, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Windsor 18 und ihre Mutter Lady Christian Faulkner 19. Sie hat 1436 in England, United Kingdom Richard Fortescue geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 10. Februar 1483 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice de Windsor è nata il nel 1413 nel Blickling, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Richard de Windsor, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Lady Christian Faulkner, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Richard Fortescue nel 1436, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 febbraio 1483, nel Devon, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.Blickling, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクブリックリング
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Windsorが1413年にイギリスノーフォルクブリックリングで生まれた時，父Richard de Windsorは18歳，母Lady Christian Faulknerは19歳であった。1436年にイギリスイギリスでRichard Fortescueと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1483年2月10日にイギリスデボンで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Windsor(이)가 1413년 영국 노르폴크 블릭링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Windsor(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Christian Faulkner(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1436년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Richard Fortescue(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1483년 2월 10일 영국 데폰에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice de Windsor nasceu em 1413, em Blickling, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Windsor, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Lady Christian Faulkner, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Fortescue em 1436, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1483, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice de Windsor родилась в 1413 г. в местности бликклинг, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Windsor было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Christian Faulkner, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Fortescue в 1436 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 10 февраля 1483 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alice de Windsor nació en 1413, en Blickling, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Windsor, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Lady Christian Faulkner, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Richard Fortescue en 1436, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de febrero de 1483, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
